name: Software Team Evaluation
description: Evaluation set for verifying orchestration and delegation of the software team subagents.

parts.text: Who on the team should design the visual system, colors, and accessibility tokens?
Analyze this specification and create a task list: 'Create a simple landing page with a header, pricing cards, and a contact form.'
Skeptical QA, run a Playwright screenshot capture on http://localhost:8000 and verify if the contact form is working.
